---
title: "Preprints and Publications"
description-meta: "Information, pdfs, and social metrics of papers"
#page-layout: full
#back-to-top-navigation: true
title-block-banner: false
css: custom.css
---

- [Auditing the auditors: Does community-based moderation get it right?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18053)<br>
  Yeganeh Alimohammadi\*, Karissa Huang\*, Christian Borgs, Jennifer Chayes (2026+).

- [Travel bans vs. social distancing: A mathematical analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.08895)<br>
  Christian Borgs, Karissa Huang, Geng Zhao (2025+). *Submitted*

- [Detecting weighted hidden cliques.](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.21543)<br>
  Urmisha Chatterjee, Karissa Huang, Ritabrata Karmakar, Vinay Kumar, Gabor Lugosi, Nandan Malhotra (2025)

- [A law of large numbers for SIR on the stochastic block model: A proof via herd immunity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.07097)<br>
  Christian Borgs, Karissa Huang, Chris Ikeokwu (2024+). *Submitted*

- [Designing and analyzing two-stage randomized experiments. *R package RCT2, version 0.0.1*.](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=RCT2)<br>
  Karissa Huang, Zhichao Jiang, Kosuke Imai (2022). *CRAN*
